title: Fines imposed remitted monthly to city treasurer
doc_html:
§2501. Fines imposed remitted monthly to city treasurer

            Each judge of the Municipal and Traffic Court of New Orleans shall ensure that all fines collected are remitted monthly to the city treasurer of New Orleans.

            Acts 2011, No. 339, §1; Acts 2014, No. 845, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017; Acts 2016, No. 631, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
doc_text:
§2501.  Fines imposed remitted monthly to city treasurer
Each judge of the Municipal and Traffic Court of New Orleans shall ensure that all
fines collected are remitted monthly to the city treasurer of New Orleans.
Acts 2011, No. 339, §1; Acts 2014, No. 845, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017; Acts 2016, No.
631, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
